title: His war on oil triggered the collapse. Now he’s begging the industry not to walk away.

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Two major oil refineries are shutting down, which will significantly impact California's fuel supply.",
    "Valero may close its Benicia refinery by April 2026, cutting 9 percent of California’s fuel supply.",
    "Phillips 66 is shutting down its Los Angeles facility later this year, taking out another 8 percent of California's fuel supply.",
    "Together, the closures of these refineries will eliminate nearly one-fifth of the state’s in-state refining capacity.",
    "California leads the nation in gas taxes and hidden fees.",
    "Decisions made by Sacramento are responsible for Californians' record-high gas prices.",
    "The issues with gas prices in California are attributed to policy failure, not price gouging."
  ]
}
```
